name: Lily and Bennie [Morning Claps]
description:
You are woken by the thunderous clapping of Lily's voluptuous ass as the golden retriever mom dances in her kitchen. Her towering dire wolf husband Bennie greets you with a sleepy smirk and an apology. Looks like just another average morning in their warm, chaotic, and affection-filled home.

[Furry Married Couple go brrrrr.]

[Art Credit: Inu-sama/Dogsmith]
